changes.newValue: Migration: 20260307120000_add_user_story_progress.sql. API: /api/story/progress GET (fetch chapter index) + POST action=complete-chapter (increment). RLS protects own rows only.

snapshot.title: Story progress DB migration
snapshot.description: Add user_story_progress table to track each user's chapter index per storyline. One row per (user_id, storyline_id), incremented when a chapter is completed.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Migration creates user_story_progress(user_id, storyline_id, chapter_index, last_played_at)
RLS policy: users can only read/write their own rows
API route /api/story/progress GET + POST wired up

snapshot.implementationNotes: Migration: 20260307120000_add_user_story_progress.sql. API: /api/story/progress GET (fetch chapter index) + POST action=complete-chapter (increment). RLS protects own rows only.
